item.title: How to bend light with your finger
item.description: In this video I show you how to bend light with your finger! Then I explain the physics behind why it happens. You have most likely been taught wrong about why this happens.

media:content.media:title: How to bend light with your finger
media:content.media:description: In this video I show you how to bend light with your finger! Then I explain the physics behind why it happens. You have most likely been taught wrong about why this happens.

item.title: How dice rolls average out
item.description: I show you why it is easier than you think to guess the total roll of a lot of dice

media:content.media:title: How dice rolls average out
media:content.media:description: I show you why it is easier than you think to guess the total roll of a lot of dice

item.title: Supersonic ping pong ball physics experiment
item.description: In this video I test out my new supersonic ping pong ball vacuum cannon. I show a little bit about how one of these is made and the theory behind how we can get to supersonic speeds with a cannon like this. Then I test it out on some apples and see the damage a ping pong ball can do at supersonic speeds. The cannon works by creating a vacuum in the PVC pipe and then when you rupture the seal on one end the air rushes in at faster than sound speeds accelerating the ping pong ball accordingly.

media:content.media:title: Supersonic ping pong ball physics experiment
media:content.media:description: In this video I test out my new supersonic ping pong ball vacuum cannon. I show a little bit about how one of these is made and the theory behind how we can get to supersonic speeds with a cannon like this. Then I test it out on some apples and see the damage a ping pong ball can do at supersonic speeds. The cannon works by creating a vacuum in the PVC pipe and then when you rupture the seal on one end the air rushes in at faster than sound speeds accelerating the ping pong ball accordingly.

item.title: Why a klein bottle won’t fill normally
item.description: I show you a trick to fill a klein bottle and talk about why it has no volume

media:content.media:title: Why a klein bottle won’t fill normally
media:content.media:description: I show you a trick to fill a klein bottle and talk about why it has no volume

item.title: What happens when neverwet meets sodium
item.description: In this video I show you what happens when you spray Neverwet, a superhydrophobic spray on sodium and then put it in water (big mistake!). I also test it on random things like bread and sugar and a paper towel.

media:content.media:title: What happens when neverwet meets sodium
media:content.media:description: In this video I show you what happens when you spray Neverwet, a superhydrophobic spray on sodium and then put it in water (big mistake!). I also test it on random things like bread and sugar and a paper towel.

item.title: How the Egely wheel works
item.description: In this video I bought and Egely Disk Vitality indicator that supposedly moves through your body's "bio-energy" or telekinesis. Is it true? I test it out myself to see if it truly can move simply through concentration. I test it with gloves on, in a jar, and even in a vacuum chamber.

media:content.media:title: How the Egely wheel works
media:content.media:description: In this video I bought and Egely Disk Vitality indicator that supposedly moves through your body's "bio-energy" or telekinesis. Is it true? I test it out myself to see if it truly can move simply through concentration. I test it with gloves on, in a jar, and even in a vacuum chamber.
